definitions.name: readmit_risk
definitions.pattern: CASE(IF(AND(<col> LIKE <val>, <col> > <val>), <val>), IF(<col> LIKE <val>, <val>), IF(NOT e.ED_DEPARTURE_TIME IS NULL, <val>), <val>)
definitions.normalized_expression: CASE WHEN clarity_edg.dx_name LIKE '%heart failure%' AND pat_enc_hsp.los_days > 7 THEN 'High' WHEN clarity_edg.dx_name LIKE '%pneumonia%' THEN 'Medium' WHEN NOT pat_enc_hsp.ed_departure_time IS NULL THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END

definitions.name: visit_type
definitions.normalized_expression: CASE pat_enc_hsp.adt_pat_class_c WHEN 1 THEN 'Inpatient' WHEN 2 THEN 'Outpatient' WHEN 3 THEN 'Emergency' ELSE 'Other' END
